designConstraints: Must integrate into existing Dashboard layout (/dashboard) without disrupting the 159-node design; add as a new card section below or alongside existing BudgetSummaryCard and RecentExpensesList
Follow 8px spacing unit system — use spacing scale values: 4, 8, 12, 16, 24, 32px for all internal padding and gaps
Card background must use surface-primary token (#1E293B / navy-surface) consistent with existing dashboard cards
Card elevation level 1 (shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)) matching BudgetSummaryCard and CategoryDonutChart card treatment
Border radius large (16px) for card container, consistent with existing card components on the dashboard
Maximum 3 levels of visual hierarchy within the card: header label → row list → row sub-elements
12-column grid layout with 24px gutters and 24px margins; card spans appropriate columns within existing dashboard grid
Content max-width 1280px, desktop-first at 1440px viewport as per existing dashboard viewport spec
RecurringFrequencyBadge must use pill border radius (9999px) consistent with existing BudgetStatusBadge pill pattern
CategoryColorDot color values must be sourced from Category.color_token / color_hex fields in the data model
Minimum touch target 44×44px for all interactive elements including upcoming-recurring-view-all-link and expense-row-recurring-badge
Text colors must use silver-text (#CBD5E1) for primary labels and muted-text (#64748B) for secondary/date text on the dark navy background
Gold-amber (#F59E0B) focus ring (2px width, 2px offset) on all interactive elements matching global focus state token
RecurringFrequencyBadge background and text must achieve 4.5:1 contrast ratio — adapt blue tokens to dark surface context using info token (#38BDF8) on navy-raised (#293548) if needed
Amount text must use DM Mono (body font family) for numeric display, consistent with expense amount rendering across the app
Section header label must use DM Sans (display font family) at heading-2 scale (16px, weight 600)
View All link and frequency badge text must use label scale (12px, weight 500, DM Mono)
Motion for row list entry: fast duration (150ms) with default easing cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1)
Empty state icon and label must be vertically centered within card, using muted-text opacity treatment
upcoming-recurring-view-all-link must be right-aligned within card footer, consistent with ExportCSVButton right-alignment pattern on Insights screen
expense-row-recurring-badge must be inline within existing ExpenseRow without increasing row height beyond current row spec
Z-index for any tooltip on recurring-frequency-badge must use tooltip z-index token (1400)
referencePatterns: Card-based data display pattern — matches BudgetSummaryCard and CategoryDonutChart card containers on Dashboard
Row list pattern with category color indicator — matches ExpenseRow with category color treatment in RecentExpensesList
Status badge / pill pattern — matches BudgetStatusBadge (on-track, heads-up, over-budget) for RecurringFrequencyBadge pill styling
Empty state pattern with icon + label — matches existing EmptyState component on Dashboard (centered icon + CTA label)
Section header label pattern — matches card section headers used in TopCategoriesCard and BiggestExpensesCard on Insights screen
Inline icon badge pattern — matches TrendIndicator inline icon usage in PeriodSummaryHeader on Insights screen
Right-aligned text link pattern — matches ExportCSVButton right-alignment on Insights screen for View All link
Amount right-alignment pattern — matches upcoming-recurring-row-amount right-aligned display consistent with RankedExpenseRow amounts
Category color dot pattern — matches CategoryLegend color dot indicators on Dashboard donut chart legend
Filter chip / frequency badge pattern — matches CategoryFilterDropdown active state chip styling for RecurringFrequencyBadge
accessibilityRequirements: WCAG 2.1 AA color contrast ratio of 4.5:1 minimum for all text elements: merchant name, date, amount, frequency badge text, empty state label, and View All link against their respective backgrounds
RecurringFrequencyBadge text must achieve 4.5:1 contrast — use #38BDF8 (info token) text on #293548 (navy-raised) background as blue.600 on blue.100 may fail on dark surfaces
CategoryColorDot must not be the sole means of conveying category information — merchant name text must always accompany the dot
upcoming-recurring-view-all-link must be keyboard focusable with visible gold-amber focus ring (2px, 2px offset) and have descriptive accessible name 'View all recurring expenses'
expense-row-recurring-badge must include aria-label describing the recurrence frequency (e.g., 'Recurring: Monthly') for screen reader users
upcoming-recurring-card must have role='region' with aria-label='Upcoming Recurring Expenses' for landmark navigation
upcoming-recurring-row-list must use a list element (ul/ol) with each upcoming-recurring-row as a list item (li) for screen reader list navigation
upcoming-recurring-empty-state must be announced to screen readers when items list is empty via aria-live='polite' region
circular-arrow-icon must have aria-hidden='true' as it is decorative; text label must convey meaning independently
recurring-inline-icon within expense-row-recurring-badge must have aria-hidden='true'; badge aria-label carries the semantic meaning
All amount values must include currency context in screen reader text (e.g., aria-label='$45.00 USD') using UserSettings.currency
Date values in upcoming-recurring-row-date must use datetime attribute on time element for machine-readable date format
isLoading state of upcoming-recurring-card must use aria-busy='true' on the card region and provide a loading announcement
Minimum touch target of 44×44px for upcoming-recurring-view-all-link — pad the clickable area if visual size is smaller
Color alone must not distinguish recurring vs non-recurring expense rows — recurring-inline-icon and text label must supplement the color indicator
Focus order within upcoming-recurring-card must follow logical reading order: header → rows (top to bottom) → View All link
Screen reader compatible alternative for category color dot: include visually hidden category name text alongside the dot
dataModelDependencies: RecurringTemplate entity (new) — fields: templateId, merchantName, amount, nextOccurrenceDate, frequency ('WEEKLY'|'MONTHLY'|'YEARLY'), categoryId, status ('ACTIVE'|'PAUSED'|'CANCELLED'), categoryColor — sourced from GET /api/recurring-templates/upcoming
Expense entity — existing model extended with isRecurringInstance (boolean) and recurringTemplateId (string) fields — sourced from GET /api/expenses
Category entity — existing model fields color_token and color_hex used for CategoryColorDot color lookup via categoryId join on recurring template items
UserSettings entity — currency field required for formatted amount display with correct currency symbol in upcoming-recurring-row-amount
CategoryAggregate entity — indirectly referenced for category color consistency between donut chart legend and recurring card color dots
